title: SandboxRegistrationRequest
description: Request sent by a sandbox worker task to register with the Session Service after picking up a session from SQS.

sandboxEndpoint.description: Internal IP:port where the sandbox is listening (e.g., http://10.0.1.42:8080).

registrationToken.description: Single-use UUID token from the SQS message. Validated against the token stored at session creation.

taskArn.description: Deprecated. Previously used for ECS task ARN validation with RunTask model. Ignored by Session Service.
